para.verbatim: Get peers subscribed to a topic.
Get mesh peers for a topic.
Get fanout peers for a topic.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str topic, bytes data, str from_peer)
memberdef.name: publish

para.verbatim: Get target peers for publishing. Returns (mesh_targets, fanout_targets).
Handle incoming message. Returns True if message should be processed.
Get targets for forwarding a message.
Perform heartbeat and return control messages to send.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str topic, str from_peer, ControlPrune prune)
memberdef.name: handle_prune

para.verbatim: Handle IHAVE control message. Returns message IDs to request.
Handle IWANT control message. Returns requested messages.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str topic, str peer, Optional[float] duration=None)
memberdef.name: _add_backoff

para.verbatim: Check if topic-peer pair is in backoff.
